sentences.arabic: يُرِيدُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ أَنْ يُصْبِحُوا صُنَّاعَ مُحْتَوًى.
sentences.translation: Mnogi mladi ljudi žele postati kreatori sadržaja.
sentences.translationEn: Many young people want to become content creators.

sentences.arabic: يَصْنَعُونَ فِيدْيُوهَاتٍ مُبْتَكَرَةً عَنِ السَّفَرِ أَوِ الطَّبْخِ أَوِ الرِّيَاضَةِ.
sentences.translation: Oni prave kreativne videozapise o putovanjima, kuhanju ili sportu.
sentences.translationEn: They make creative videos about travel, cooking, or sports.

sentences.arabic: لِلْمُؤَثِّرِينَ دَوْرٌ كَبِيرٌ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ الْحَدِيثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Influenseri imaju veliku ulogu u modernoj digitalnoj kulturi.
sentences.translationEn: Influencers have a big role in modern digital culture.
